questions: What does Nielsen’s 2024 annual report say about ROI priorities?
How are marketers adapting budgets and measurement?
qa.answer: Marketers plan to increase investment, especially in digital video and retail media, while focusing on better measurement of ROI amid signal loss. Balancing brand and performance remains a priority.
implication: Evaluate retail media/CTV fit; ensure incrementality reads.
Invest in data quality and triangulated measurement to guide shifts.
Maintain brand investment floors alongside performance optimization.
